tracks.name: Infrastructure & GCP Setup
tracks.description: Local environment configuration, GCP resource provisioning (GCS, BigQuery), and Docker/Conda scaffolding.

tracks.name: Data Ingestion & QC
tracks.description: Automated collection of ClinVar, gnomAD, and Arab-specific datasets to GCS. Perform initial QC and data-type validation.

tracks.name: Data Harmonization & Normalization
tracks.description: Implementing pipelines (bcftools, vt) for variant normalization and lifting over all data to GRCh38.

tracks.name: Master Dataset & Analysis Engine
tracks.description: Building the harmonized Master Dataset in BigQuery and implementing the ACMG rule-based engine (PM2, BS1, etc.).

tracks.name: Statistical Evaluation & Results
tracks.description: Performing statistical analysis of classification shifts and generating high-quality research visualizations in Vertex AI.

last_successful_step: T002 step 5.8 finalized on 2026-03-12: T002 is now closed as a raw-freeze/static-review milestone, and T003 is the next active stage starting at task 1.3 with GCS/DuckDB-first harmonized artifacts.
